steps.title: Find the contrast
steps.content: Portugal requires voters to be at least 18, while Argentina allows citizens to vote at 16. The blank must signal that the second fact differs from the first.

steps.title: Check the transition choices
steps.content: B would introduce an example, but Argentina's rule is not an example of Portugal's. C would start a sequence, and D would show a result, neither of which matches the relationship. The answer is A.
